# Muhammad Arif bin Fazil — Geoscientist & AI Governance Architect

> Personal site of Arif Fazil: geologist, economist, and architect of arifOS — a thermodynamic constitutional governance framework for lawful, audited AI systems.

Muhammad Arif bin Fazil (Arif) is a Malaysian geoscientist, economist, and software architect who bridges deep geological time with computational governance. Trained as a Petronas Scholar (Penang, 1990), Arif's work applies thermodynamic principles from subsurface systems to AI accountability, creating arifOS — a constitutional kernel that enforces truth, reversibility, and human sovereignty over artificial intelligence.

This site documents the intersection of geology, thermodynamics, and AI governance.

## About

- [Home](https://arif-fazil.com/): Overview of Arif's work
- [Writing](https://arif-fazil.com/writing/): Essays on AI governance, thermodynamics, geological reasoning

## Core Work

- Constitutional AI — Governance over persuasion. Machines need law.
- Thermodynamic Systems — Intelligence generates heat; governance is the cooling mechanism.
- Geoscience & Energy — Subsurface interpretation, frontier basin studies, prospect maturation.

## arifOS Framework

- [arifOS Docs](https://arifos.arif-fazil.com): Constitutional governance kernel documentation
- [MCP Runtime](https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com): Production MCP server, 11 tools, 13 floors
- [GitHub](https://github.com/ariffazil/arifOS): Open-source constitutional AI governance framework
- [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/arifosmcp/): pip install arifosmcp

## Contact

- Email: arifbfazil@gmail.com
- Location: Seri Kembangan, Selangor, Malaysia
- GitHub: https://github.com/ariffazil

---
*Ditempa Bukan Diberi — Forged, Not Given [ΔΩΨ | ARIF]*
